description:
Update a Generic Tool's attributes. For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool.

id.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool.

abbreviation.description: Abbreviation for the Title. Will be used as a prefix for the Generic Tool Item number.

domain_id.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool domain.

title.description: Primary name/title for the generic tool.
The title of the generic tool.

abbreviation.description: An abbreviation for the generic tool.

private_by_default.description: If this property is set to true, any items that are created for the tool are private by default.

new_project_default.description: If this property is set to true, the generic tool will be added to new projects by default.

send_overdue_notifications.description: If this property is set to true, notifications will be sent to assignees when an item is overdue.
